body.title: CLOSED: watch_problems confidence accumulator
body.result: confidence_score column + decay in lever_watcher; threshold-gated escalation; 12 tests pass
body.description:
Implements 'ramping to threshold' from the neuroscience decision paper: each watch_problem accumulates cross-cycle evidence until a decision bound is crossed. Adds two columns to instance.watch_problems: confidence_score float DEFAULT 0.0, last_evidenced_at timestamptz.

Behavior changes in lever_watcher():
- On TWM keyword match: confidence_score = min(confidence_score + 0.1, 1.0); last_evidenced_at = now().
- On no-match cycle (called from coa.py): confidence_score *= IGOR_WATCH_CONFIDENCE_DECAY (default 0.95); if score < 0.01, set to 0.0.
- When confidence_score crosses IGOR_WATCH_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD (default 0.7): trigger escalation at elevated severity + mark surfaced.
- Below threshold: accumulate silently — no surfacing, no escalation.

relevance_score is 1.0 for any keyword match (hook for future embedding-based scoring; no regression from current all-or-nothing behavior).

**Affected files:** `wild_igor/igor/cognition/watch_problems.py`, DB migration (confidence_score + last_evidenced_at on instance.watch_problems)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; direct psycopg2; threshold configurable via IGOR_WATCH_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD (default 0.7); decay configurable via IGOR_WATCH_CONFIDENCE_DECAY (default 0.95); no change to add_watch_problem() or resolve_problem() signatures
**Scope boundary:** IN — confidence accumulation in lever_watcher(), threshold-triggered escalation, decay on no-match cycles, two new columns. OUT — no UI, no embedding matching (keywords still used; embeddings are T-igor-activate-primitive's domain), no changes to add_watch_problem() or resolve_problem().
**Test plan:** three successive lever_watcher() keyword matches accumulate confidence_score toward 0.3; crossing 0.7 threshold triggers escalation; no-match cycle applies 0.95 decay; confidence_score never exceeds 1.0; existing tests test_lever_watcher_finds_match, test_lever_watcher_no_match_on_unrelated, test_lever_watcher_dedup_24h all still pass
